address.address1: Jl. Genensa Baru, Kemili, Kec. Bebesen Genensa baru

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Take a look at these facilities:
Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing
